title: Projectiles, Edge Triggers, Cooldowns, Lifetimes, and Reuse · Transfer Build
summary: An independent adaptive-arcade team receives a different viewport, device, frame rate, seed, entity count, accessibility profile, platform, and delivery constraint and transfers projectiles, edge triggers, cooldowns, lifetimes, and reuse into a changed bounded projectile lifecycle. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of bounded projectile lifecycle with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, cau…
objectives: Convert action edges and held auto-fire policy into deterministic fire requests separate from object creation.
Gate shots using simulation time, inclusive boundary tests, pause semantics, and a visible or audible readiness cue.
Derive muzzle position and velocity from ship transform while deciding whether ship momentum contributes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Fire Intent
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Asteroids team handles case 6283 during a headless continuous-integration replay. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate edge-triggered firing on cooldown, lifetime, live-count, reuse, and deterministic projectile ownership; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native display, device, audio, file, package, and operating-system effects; then replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Convert action edges and held auto-fire policy into deterministic fire requests separate from object creation.

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Pool Reset
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: asteroids-pool-reset-5if1t0" that uses case 4830 to gate edge-triggered firing on cooldown, lifetime, live-count, reuse, and deterministic projectile ownership. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not claim native pygame-ce, SDL, window, controller, mixer, filesystem, package, GPU, installer, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, released pygame-ce 2.5.7, fixed and headless SDL fixtures, real devices, licensed assets, accessibility playtests, profiling, clean installations, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Pool Reset.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Pool Reset into observable performance evidence. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Pool Reset, keep Pool Reset connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-pool-reset-5if1t0
# Competency: asteroids-pool-reset.
# Case 4830: a controller-remapping accessibility review.
# Operating constraint: keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native display, device, audio, file, package, and operating-system effects.
# Changed case: run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save.
def evidence_asteroids_pool_reset_5if1t0(requested_shots: int = 12, accepted_shots: int = 5, cooldown_ms: int = 180, lifetime_ms: int = 900, live_cap: int = 6, leaked_projectiles: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_5if1t0 = "5if1t0-0t1fi5-4830"
    assert evidence_variant_5if1t0
    evidence_axes_5if1t0 = (
        "player5if1t0",
        "seed4830",
        "input0t1fi5",
        "frame5if1t04830",
        "state48305if1t0",
        "playtest0t1fi54830",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_5if1t0)) == 6
    if requested_shots < 0 or accepted_shots < 0 or cooldown_ms < 1:
        return False, accepted_shots, "projectile-domain"
    if accepted_shots > requested_shots or accepted_shots > live_cap:
        return False, accepted_shots, "fire-budget"
    if lifetime_ms <= cooldown_ms:
        return False, lifetime_ms, "lifetime-policy"
    if leaked_projectiles > 0:
        return False, leaked_projectiles, "ownership-leak"
    assert accepted_shots <= live_cap
    return True, accepted_shots, "bounded-projectiles"

steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Asteroids team handles case 5810 during a low-power integrated-GPU frame-budget trial. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate edge-triggered firing on cooldown, lifetime, live-count, reuse, and deterministic projectile ownership; retain player goal, revision, Python, pygame-ce, SDL, fixture, seed, input trace, viewport, and result identity; then replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: If reuse is justified, reset all position, velocity, age, owner, collision, render, and active fields and prove reconciliation.
